description: Resolve the 'Office printer not printing - paper jam message' service request in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus. Set the status to Resolved and add the resolution: 'Cleared paper path, reset printer firmware. Printer is now operational and all test pages printed successfully.' Log in with username: administrator, password: administrator.

metadata.request_subject: Office printer not printing - paper jam message
metadata.resolution: Cleared paper path, reset printer firmware. Printer is now operational and all test pages printed successfully.
